name: Speedroid Clear Wing Wonder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピードロイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>／<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＣＷＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クリアウィングワンダー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of different Monster Types among the WIND Synchro Monsters you control; destroy them. If your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 WIND Synchro Monster you control; banish it, then return it to the field. You can only use each effect of "Speedroid Clear Wing Wonder" once per turn.
eff: Target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of different Monster Types among the WIND Synchro Monsters you control; destroy them. If your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 WIND Synchro Monster you control; banish it, then return it to the field. You can only use each effect of "Speedroid Clear Wing Wonder" once per turn.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
